# Alex Movie Theatre — Alexandria, Indiana

## About
Alex Movie Theatre is an independent two-screen cinema located in Alexandria, Indiana,
approximately 50 miles northeast of Indianapolis. It serves the local community with
affordable ticket prices and a variety of programming.

## Key Facts
- Address: 407 N. Harrison Street, Alexandria, IN 46001
- Phone: 765-620-9093
- Screens: Two (Large Screen and Small Screen)
- Ticket Prices: $5 adults / $3 children

## Services
- Current movie screenings (large and small screen)
- Online ticket purchasing via internal purchase system (required for small screen)
- Free senior movie program (ages 55+, sponsored by Senior Essential Connections)
- Concession stand
- Private screenings and birthday rentals
- Special events

## Rental Information
- Group minimum spend: $100
- New release rental: $5 adult / $3 child (minimum $75)
- Alternative film rental: $75 flat fee
- No outside food except birthday cakes

## Key Pages
- Now Showing: /cs/alex-movie-theater/
- Senior Movie: /cs/alex-movie-theater/senior-movie.php
- Concessions: /cs/alex-movie-theater/concessions.php
- Events: /cs/alex-movie-theater/events.php
- Private Screenings: /cs/alex-movie-theater/private-screenings.php
- Location: /cs/alex-movie-theater/location.php
- Contact: /cs/alex-movie-theater/contact.php
